items.html: Now we shall explain this Kli [vessel] — what its matter is. For our sages said, in the Saba de Mishpatim [the Elder of the Zohar portion Mishpatim], that a woman's husband leaves in her a Ruach [spirit] which he casts into her. And the secret of the matter: it is known that the name BON [52] is in Malchut. It is also called Nefesh, for AB [72], SAG [63], MA [45], BON [52] are Haya, Neshama, Ruach, Nefesh; and this name BON is what is called the Nefesh of David, the Nefesh of Malchut. And before this discernment of the Nefesh enters her, she is deficient and unfit to bear — which is why the Treifa [mortally stricken] does not bear, until she has her Nefesh in its completeness.
